channel.title: CookPlanStudio
channel.description: Sparkle auto-update feed for CookPlanStudio. Items are appended by scripts/release-studio.sh in the private CookPlanMobile source repo after each notarized DMG cut. EdDSA signatures verify against the SUPublicEDKey embedded in the running app's Info.plist. This file is served from the public CookPlanStudio-releases repo because the source repo is private and not anonymously readable.
